title: Western Tigers beat Celtics FC
description: SOCCER NEWS - The Western Tigers Football...
bodyText:
SOCCER NEWS - The Western Tigers Football Club sank the newly promoted Celtics FC 1-0 in a Geolfa League game at the Lawaaikamp Stadium last Saturday.


> Both teams are fighting their way up to reach the top in the Geolfa Promotional League.


The only goal of the game was scored in the first half by Masixole Yalolo of Western Tigers after a strong drive from the centre of the field.

Promotional League results

Bangalore 1-1 Abahlali FC

Raul Stars 1-0 FC Pacaltsdorp

Black Cats 2-2 Young Pirates

Burning Fire 1-1 Western Tigers

All Stars 3-0 Heaven Stars

Future Stars 3-2 Paris United

Vista 2-2 Celtics FC

Silver 2-0 Bangalore

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
